shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- repo status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- relevant files ---\\n' && rg --files src/components/Tooltip src/test | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-tooltip clickable tooltip pointer leaves anchor tooltip body close delay interactive content" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,280p' src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx && printf '\\n--- Tooltip.tsx ---\\n' && sed -n '1,360p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx && printf '\\n--- behavior tests ---\\n' && sed -n '1,360p' src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '240,620p' src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx && printf '\\n--- Tooltip remainder ---\\n' && sed -n '300,760p' src/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx && printf '\\n--- utils relevant ---\\n' && rg -n \"hoveringTooltip|clickable|mouseEnter|mouseLeave|mouseenter|mouseleave\" src/components src/test/tooltip*"

/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --pretty false && yarn lint && node_modules/.bin/jest src/test/tooltip-interactions.spec.js src/test/tooltip-props.spec.js src/test/tooltip-edge-cases.spec.js --runInBand'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
